messages.content: me and jordan broke up last weekend and i'm just kinda sad about it

I'm really sorry to hear that. Breakups are rough, especially when it's still so fresh - a week isn't very long at all.

Do you want to talk about it? Like, are you more in the "just need to vent" headspace, or the "trying to make sense of it" headspace, or honestly just kind of... sitting with it?
it was pretty mutual, nobody did anything terrible, we just wanted different things

Those can actually be some of the hardest ones in a way - like there's no villain, no clear reason to be angry, just... sadness. It's harder to know what to do with that sometimes.

How are you holding up tonight? Evenings can be a tough time when you're going through something like this.
still though, three years. i keep reaching for my phone to text them stuff and then remembering

Oh, that's such a specific kind of hurt. Three years means they were just *woven into your day* - all those little moments where your first instinct is still "I need to tell Jordan this." That reflex doesn't just switch off overnight.

What kind of stuff do you keep wanting to text them?
i had a little cry tonight watching one of our old shows. felt good actually, like letting it out

That's actually really healthy - letting yourself feel it rather than pushing it down. A good cry can be such a release.

And watching a show you shared together... that's kind of a way of honoring what you had too, you know? Three years of memories don't just disappear and maybe they shouldn't.

Are you doing okay otherwise tonight - like, do you have people around or are you on your own?
i'll be ok, i know i will. just gonna be a sad few weeks and that's normal i think

Yeah, that's exactly right. You seem to have a pretty healthy perspective on it honestly - not trying to rush past it or pretend it's fine, just letting it be what it is.

Sad few weeks sounds about right for three years. Be kind to yourself through it.

Is there anything that's been helping, even a little?
